attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_BACKLOG_CODES.TYPE1, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_BACKLOG_CODES.COLUMN1, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_BACKLOG_CODES.COLUMN2, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_BACKLOG_CODES.COLUMN3, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_BACKLOG_CODES.COLUMN4, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_BACKLOG_CODES.COLUMN5, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_BACKLOG_CODES.CODES_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_BACKLOG_CODES.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_BACKLOG_CODES.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_BACKLOG_CODES.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_BACKLOG_CODES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_BACKLOG_CODES.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_BACKLOG_CODES.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_BACKLOG_CODES.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_BACKLOG_CODES.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_BACKLOG_CODES.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_BACKLOG_CODES.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_BACKLOG_CODES.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_BACKLOG_CODES.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_BACKLOG_CODES.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_BACKLOG_CODES.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_BACKLOG_CODES.DISABLED1, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_BACKLOG_CODES.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_BACKLOG_CODES.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_BACKLOG_CODES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_BACKLOG_CODES.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_BACKLOG_CODES STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_BACKLOG_CODES,
 (
 select CODES_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_BACKLOG_CODES
 minus
 select CODES_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXSCM_PL_BACKLOG_CODES
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.CODES_ID = STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_BACKLOG_CODES.CODES_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_BACKLOG_CODES.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXSCM_PL_BACKLOG_CODES)
